Caching & NoSQL DB: Redis and ElasticSearch Log Aggregation & Data Analytics: Splunk, Dynatrace New relic, Datadog and Grafana EDUCATION Bachelor of Technology in Information Technology, University of Madras, India Experience: Virtusa Tenure: Sep 2024 to Till Date Client: Fidelity Investments Project: Wingnav/Wayfinder (AI/ML) Wayfinder is an enterprise grade AI Platform that translates natural language into validated SQL queries for complex relational databases. Designed for secure, scalable and context aware query generation. Wayfinder combines deterministic schema analysis with advanced LLMS to deliver accurate, workflow-ready SQL for business users and developers. This project provided the foundation for AI driven software architecture, secure data engineering, and orchestration of production grade ML pipelines. Project: Payment/finance Driver Tenure: Nov 2019 to Mar 2024 Payment Driver provides estimated cost for Leasing and Buying new cars on MBUSA site. We collect various data points from users based on the local state government policies and business rules. We provide overall cost with tax and fee breakdowns. Finance driver service collects user credit information if they opt to lend from MBFS (Mercedes Benz Financial Services). KYC is used to support the documents submission module as part of finance driver services. Roles and Responsibility • Converted the legacy Soap based web services to Rest based Spring boot microservices • Designed and developed KYC module using AWS OCR (Optical Character Recognition) • Processed various data feeds and inventories using Apache
